name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address: Repeal and Replace Obamacare
body:
Watch President Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation about repealing and replacing Obamacare. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0c12a9778e9c2b98ec8c04511723eb34d4c82dc9381e305deaf2aa3c963410d4278b3435d9375e7b8f0253dec026408955aa145b679dfe18)

Seven years ago this month, despite profound objections of American people, Obamacare was signed into law. Our citizens were told they would have to pass Obamacare to find out what was in it, and now they have learned it was merely hundreds of pages of broken promises.

The law is collapsing around us, and we must act fast to save Americans from its wreckage.

President Donald J. Trump along with House Republicans have put forward a plan that gets rid of the disastrous law and replaces it with reforms that empower states and consumers. Americans will, once again, have the choice and the freedom to make the decisions that are right for **their families.**

To hear an important message from President Trump, **[watch his Weekly Address to the Nation where he lays out the plan to restore freedom, choice and opportunity back to American people.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0c12a9778e9c2b985c3e88227783290c47003217a214a269bf6b0c7219d099bfd9a56dea1c207414e548ae50f349ec28b8c338bfd868a5a5)**

**[Watch Now](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0c12a9778e9c2b98ec8c04511723eb34d4c82dc9381e305deaf2aa3c963410d4278b3435d9375e7b8f0253dec026408955aa145b679dfe18)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0c12a9778e9c2b98cd1cbe515d74ee0862190885259a82cf6dc1af680dd6f2a472b9d32f921d8dea83945fe25fc395d1c83be6d9cec1a4e4) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0c12a9778e9c2b98c144f6e19877c1da51fdf51ef394662d9130b16f3feb35d07406f39ba8ca02fb482b1846737c3638eaf965a685f87a1d)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4abca9df8103786322eb4b88c21aabda3a08a3bb48da0b6deffff7aad57a79508c9b87f744ff60a8b47631d9fc8fe072d)

name: DNC War Room
subject: We're fighting to save health care. Sign on if you're with us.
body:

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c4a3/4067b0a/2de643824/7e7f2c77/996310005/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170311_dnc_nd&source=em_20170311_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c4a3/4067b0a/2de643824/7e7f2c74/996310005/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170311_dnc_nd&source=em_20170311_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c4a3/4067b0a/2de643824/7e7f2c72/996310005/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170311_dnc_nd&source=em_20170311_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20Headquarters?=
subject: After his first full month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
President Trump is just getting started. |

Friend, After President Trump’s first full month in office... ✓ 235,000 jobs were added to our economy in February -- 100,000 more than what was expected ✓ 40% fewer illegal immigrants crossed our border (even before the border wall has been constructed) ✓ $3 trillion were added to the stock market as optimism about our economy continues to soar ✓ Billions of dollars will be invested here in the United States by businesses that are encouraged by President Trump’s economic policies ✓ Judge Gorsuch, a constitutionalist worthy of Justice Scalia’s seat, was nominated to the Supreme Court President Trump is just getting started. He will not rest until we truly Make America Great Again! But to get the message of our great achievements past the Fake News Media filter and straight to the American people, we’re going to need your help. Please accept your 2017 Sustaining Membership by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $10, or even just $5. Thanks, Trump Headquarters

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Hello, Your Health Care Petition is Inside 📎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd14/2a380d31/15e17243/feebc3/4109524798/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd14/2a380d31/15e17243/feebc3/4109524798/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Washington Republicans' plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act and defund Planned Parenthood is even worse than we anticipated.
First, it would prevent millions of women and men from accessing reproductive health care and cancer screenings. But it doesn't stop there.
It would also end Medicaid expansion, our best tool for combating the substance abuse crisis. And it would disproportionately drive up health care costs for older Americans and Granite Staters -- all so insurance companies can pad their bottom lines and reward their CEOs with tax breaks.
We just pulled the data -- it looks like you haven't yet signed our petition opposing this plan. [**Washington Republicans are going to try to ram this bill through as quickly as they can, so please add your name immediately to say that you oppose repealing the Affordable Care Act and defunding Planned Parenthood.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd14/2a380d31/15e17243/feebcc/4109524798/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170204_ACA-petition?source=e20170311_ACApetition2-NO_all&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking a stand against this disastrous bill.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd14/2a380d31/15e17243/feebcd/4109524798/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAzX2FjYXBldGl0aW9uIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzAzMTFfQUNBcGV0aXRpb24yLU5PX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201703_acapetition?refcode=e20170311_ACApetition2-NO_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd14/2a380d31/15e17243/feebce/4109524798/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
